mapper.select:
select mt.market_no, mt.market_title, to_char(mt.market_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as market_date, mt.market_writer, mt.view_count, mt.sell_addr, mt.sell_price, m.member_name,
( select count(*) from market_like_tbl ml where ml.market_no = mt.market_no ) as like_count,
( select count(*) from market_report_tbl mr where mr.market_no = mt.market_no ) as report_count,
( select count(*) from market_comment_tbl c where c.market_no = mt.market_no ) as comment_count,
( select member_thumb from member_tbl m2 where m2.member_id = mt.market_writer ) as member_thumb,
( select market_file_path from ( select mf.market_file_path from market_file_tbl mf where mf.market_no = mt.market_no order by mf.market_file_no asc ) where rownum = 1 ) as market_thumb,
( select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = ( select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = market_writer ) ) as hex_code
,(select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = mt.market_no and member_id = #{memberId}) AS is_like
from market_tbl mt join member_tbl m on mt.market_writer = m.member_id
where market_status = #{status} and completed = 0
and ( #{location} = 0 or sell_addr like '%' || case #{location} when 1 then '서울' when 2 then '강원' when 3 then '경기' when 4 then '경남' when 5 then '경북' when 6 then '광주' when 7 then '대구' when 8 then '대전' when 9 then '부산' when 10 then '세종' when 11 then '울산' when 12 then '인천' when 13 then '전남' when 14 then '전북' when 15 then '제주' when 16 then '충남' when 17 then '충북' end || '%' )
and market_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and market_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by market_no desc order by market_no asc order by view_count desc order by like_count desc order by sell_price desc order by comment_count desc
offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
mapper.insert: insert into market_tbl values( #{marketNo}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, sysdate, 1, #{marketWriter}, 0, #{sellAddr}, #{sellPrice}, 0, null )
mapper.select:
select m.market_no, m.market_title, m.market_content, m.market_date, m.market_status, m.market_writer, m.view_count, m.sell_addr, m.sell_price, m.completed, m.completed_date, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = m.market_writer) member_name, ( select member_thumb from member_tbl mt where mt.member_id = m.market_writer ) as member_thumb, (select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = m.market_no) as like_count, ( select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = (select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = market_writer)) as hex_code
,(select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and member_id = #{memberId}) AS is_like
,(select count(*) from market_report_tbl where market_no = m.market_no) as report_count
,(select count(*) from market_report_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and member_id = #{memberId}) as is_report
,(select count(*) from trade_request_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and buyer_id = #{memberId}) as is_request
from market_tbl m where m.market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.update: update market_tbl set view_count = view_count+1 where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}

select m.market_no, m.market_title, to_char(m.market_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') market_date, m.market_writer, m.view_count, m.sell_addr, m.sell_price, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = m.market_writer) as member_name, ( select market_file_path from ( select mf.market_file_path from market_file_tbl mf where mf.market_no = m.market_no order by mf.market_file_no asc ) where rownum = 1 ) marketThumb,
(select count(*) from market_like_tbl ml where ml.market_no = m.market_no) like_count
, (select count(*) from market_like_tbl ml2 where ml2.market_no = m.market_no and ml2.member_id = #{memberId}) as is_like
from market_tbl m where m.market_status = 1 and m.completed = 0
and m.sell_addr like #{region} || '%'
order by m.market_no desc
order by m.view_count desc
offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only

select count(*) from market_comment_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and market_recomment_no is null
and is_secret = 1
and is_secret = 0

select t.market_comment_no, t.market_no, t.market_comment_writer, t.market_comment_content, to_char(t.market_comment_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') market_comment_date, t.market_recomment_no, t.is_secret, t.is_edited, m.member_name, m.member_thumb, ( select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = (select current_color_id from member_tbl where member_id = market_comment_writer)) as hex_code from ( select * from market_comment_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
start with market_comment_no in ( select market_comment_no from ( select market_comment_no from market_comment_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and market_recomment_no is null
and is_secret = 1
and is_secret = 0
order by market_comment_no asc
order by market_comment_no desc
) offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only )
connect by prior market_comment_no = market_recomment_no
order by market_comment_no asc
order by market_comment_no desc
) t left join member_tbl m on (t.market_comment_writer = m.member_id)
mapper.insert: insert into market_comment_tbl values ( market_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{marketCommentContent}, sysdate, #{marketNo}, #{marketCommentWriter}, #{marketRecommentNo}, #{isSecret}, 0 )
mapper.select: select market_writer from market_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
select market_file_no, market_file_name, market_file_path, market_no from market_file_tbl where market_file_path = #{marketFilePath}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_file_history ( market_file_no, market_file_name, market_file_path, market_no ) VALUES
( #{item.marketFileNo}, #{item.marketFileName}, #{item.marketFilePath}, #{item.marketNo} )
mapper.update: update market_comment_tbl set market_comment_content = #{marketCommentContent}, is_secret = #{isSecret}, is_edited = 1 where market_comment_no = #{marketCommentNo}
mapper.select: select market_file_path from market_file_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.insert: insert into trade_request_tbl values( trade_request_seq.NEXTVAL, #{marketNo}, #{buyerId}, #{message}, 1, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.delete: delete from trade_request_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and buyer_id= #{buyerId}
mapper.select: select * from trade_request_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and status = 1
mapper.update: update market_tbl set completed = 1, completed_date = sysdate where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.delete: delete from market_report_tbl where market_no= #{marketNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select score_no, history_status, member_id, market_no, case when s.market_no is null then '닉네임 변경' else ( select m.market_title from market_tbl m where m.market_no = s.market_no ) end as market_title, changed_score, score_date from score_history_tbl s
where member_id = #{memberId}
and history_status = 1
and history_status = 2
order by score_date desc order by score_date asc
offset #{request.page}*#{request.size} rows fetch next #{request.size} rows only
select market_no, market_writer from market_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.insert: insert into score_history_tbl values( score_history_seq.nextval, #{sellerId}, #{marketNo}, 1, 100, sysdate )
insert into score_history_tbl values( score_history_seq.nextval, #{buyerId}, #{marketNo}, 1, 100, sysdate )
